---
title: "Day 1: Madison to Frankfurt"
subtitle: "Departure Day — Wheels Up for Italy"
date: "2026-06-05"
day-of-week: "Friday"
location: "Madison, WI → Chicago O'Hare → Frankfurt, Germany (overnight)"
categories: [itinerary, travel, departure]
---

## Overview

**The adventure begins!** Today we fly from Madison to Chicago, then board a Lufthansa Premium Economy overnight flight to Frankfurt. We'll land in Frankfurt tomorrow afternoon and connect to Florence.

**Today's Flights:**

| # | Flight | Route | Departs | Arrives | Cabin |
|---|--------|-------|---------|---------|-------|
| 1 | LH 8835 (GoJet/United Express) | MSN → ORD | 5:45pm | 7:00pm | Economy |
| 2 | LH 0433 | ORD → FRA | 10:30pm | Sat 2:05pm | **Premium Economy** |

**Reservation Code:** FMWYOJ | Seats (Flight 1): 15C (Dan), 15D (Jane)

---

## Morning & Afternoon: Final Preparations

### Before You Leave Home

- [ ] Confirm flight status: lufthansa.com or the Lufthansa app
- [ ] Check in online opens 23 hours before: check in for LH 8835 (MSN→ORD) and LH 0433 (ORD→FRA) separately
- [ ] Charge all electronics: phone, camera, portable battery pack
- [ ] Pack carry-on with 24-hour essentials (clothes, medications, toiletries)
- [ ] Have passport in carry-on — **not** checked bag
- [ ] Verify credit cards: notify banks of travel dates
- [ ] Empty refrigerator of perishables
- [ ] Set thermostat, lock windows and doors, take out trash
- [ ] Confirm pet/plant care arranged

### Luggage Allowance

**Both checked and carry-on bags:**
- Checked: 2x23kg (50 lbs) per person
- Carry-on: 1 piece per person (no weight stated for LH 8835 leg)

**What to put in carry-on:**
- Passport (non-negotiable)
- Boarding passes (digital + printed backup)
- Medications (full supply — never checked)
- 1–2 changes of clothes (in case bag is delayed)
- Phone charger + portable battery
- Snacks
- Eye mask, earplugs, neck pillow (for overnight flight)
- Entertainment: downloaded shows, books, podcasts

---

## Flight 1: Madison → Chicago (LH 8835)

**Operated by:** GoJet Airlines for United Express for United Airlines
**Aircraft:** Air 109
**Duration:** 1 hour 15 minutes
**Cabin:** Economy | **Seats:** 15C (Dan), 15D (Jane)
**Meals:** No meal service

- Departs MSN 5:45pm → Arrives ORD 7:00pm (Terminal 2)
- Short regional hop — arrive at airport by 3:45pm (2 hours early for international connection)
- After landing at ORD Terminal 2, make your way to Terminal 1 for the Lufthansa departure

---

## Chicago O'Hare Layover (7:00pm–10:30pm) — ~3.5 Hours

**At O'Hare:**
- Arrive Terminal 2 (United)
- Take the ATS people mover to **Terminal 1** (Lufthansa international departures)
- Follow signs for LH 0433 gate
- Allow 30–45 minutes to get between terminals and through any additional security

**Use the time:**
- Eat dinner — 10.5+ hours until landing in Frankfurt
- Find the gate and confirm it on departure boards
- Fill water bottle for the flight
- Visit airport lounge if you have access (Amex Platinum, Chase Sapphire, etc.)
- Stretch and walk — long flight ahead

---

## Flight 2: Chicago → Frankfurt (LH 0433)

**Aircraft:** Airbus A343 (wide-body long-haul jet)
**Duration:** 8 hours 35 minutes
**Cabin:** **Premium Economy** — wider seats, more legroom, dedicated service
**Meals:** Refreshments + full meal service

- Departs ORD Terminal 1, 10:30pm (Friday, June 5)
- Arrives FRA Terminal 1, 2:05pm **(Saturday, June 6)**

### Premium Economy on Lufthansa A343

**What to expect:**
- Dedicated Premium Economy cabin (rows 20–30 typically)
- Seat width: ~18–19 inches, seat pitch: ~38 inches
- Adjustable footrest, headrest, lumbar support
- Premium meal service with real crockery
- Dedicated overhead bin space
- Priority boarding after Business class

### Sleep Strategy (Transatlantic)

Florence is UTC+2 in June (7 hours ahead of Madison CDT). To minimize jet lag:
- **Set your watch to Italian time immediately at boarding** (~17:30 Italian time when you board)
- Flight arrives Frankfurt at 2:05pm Italian time — try to sleep 7+ hours on board
- Decline meals if they interfere with sleep
- Use eye mask and earplugs
- Recline seat fully, use footrest

### In-Flight Tips

**Do:**
- Hydrate steadily (water, avoid excessive alcohol)
- Walk aisles every 2 hours (compression socks help)
- Sleep on an Italian schedule

**Don't:**
- Overdrink alcohol (dehydrates, worsens jet lag)
- Stay seated the entire flight

---

## Tomorrow: Frankfurt → Florence

We land Frankfurt at 2:05pm and connect to Florence (LH 9498, departs 4:50pm, arrives **Florence 6:30pm**). See [Day 2](day-02-2026-06-06-arrive-florence.qmd).

---

## Links & Resources

- [Flights Research](../research/flights.qmd) — Complete booking details
- [Packing List](../research/packing-list.qmd) — Final checklist
- [Day 2: Arrive Florence](day-02-2026-06-06-arrive-florence.qmd)
